title: Technical Farming 2.0
description: A 1.20+ modpack that focuses on building and operating everything farmable.
body: This modpack focuses on farming food, resources, and epic boss fights. Farmer's Delight and Croptopia add hundreds of craftable and farmable foods that you can turn into hearts with Spice of Life for Fabric. Those extra hearts and Advanced Netherite are going to come in handy if you stumble onto a Boss of Mass Destruction. For those players that prefer a machine or Create Contraption to do their farming for them, we also included Modern Industrialization. With all the resources you're going to be collecting, storage options are going to be a must so we added everything from Tom's Simple Storage to AE2. So whether you want to farm it big or homestead it small this pack offers it.
